candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Higher-gain unstable reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the live successor increment.
Safe lower-bound reference: keep the live predecessor carry state and replace only the successor increment with the cached analogue.
Increment-only direction trust-region toward the cached increment, keeping the live increment norm unchanged.

increment_component_table.where_produced: batch rollout loop carry state before calling _plan_tf2_micro_step
increment_component_table.used_for: predecessor carry state for successor increment composition

increment_component_table.where_produced: _plan_tf2_micro_step: z_on_k + dt * on_velocity, then optionally stabilized by the existing full-vector terminal-angle clip on the preterminal step
increment_component_table.used_for: live successor value before increment-only reformulation

increment_component_table.where_produced: derived inside this suite as z_on_next_live - z_on_k_live
increment_component_table.used_for: preterminal live successor increment under test

increment_component_table.where_produced: derived inside this suite as z_on_next_cached - z_on_k_cached from _build_cached_plan(...)
increment_component_table.used_for: cached analogue used either as lower-bound replacement or as the direction anchor for the trust-region reformulation
